description: Rename the brain subsystem to sched across CLI, REST API, statusline, hooks, live docs, and state paths. Mechanical rename; historical ADRs keep 'brain' in titles. Backward-compat: `hex brain` stays as hidden alias with stderr deprecation for one release; /api/brain/* stays dual-routed. 401 files touched per ADR-2604150000 impact analysis.

phases.description: Baseline audit. Confirm grep inventory, verify no Cargo feature gates or pub re-exports on 'brain', check SQLite schema for brain-embedded column/table names, snapshot test surface that will need rename.
phases.name: Audit and baseline

tasks.description: Run workspace grep for \bbrain\b|hex_brain|hex-brain across *.rs *.ts *.toml *.yml *.yaml *.json *.md *.cjs excluding target/ node_modules/ .git/ .claude/worktrees/. Save per-file hit counts to tmp/brain-audit.txt. Verify no Cargo feature named 'brain' (grep Cargo.toml files). Verify no 'pub use brain' re-exports outside hex-cli/src/commands/. Verify no Rust cfg(feature = "brain"). Inspect SQLite schema in hex-nexus/src/adapters/state_sqlite.rs for any column/table with 'brain' in the name.
tasks.name: Audit sweep

phases.description: Rename the CLI module. hex-cli/src/commands/brain.rs -> sched.rs; module references brain -> sched. Keep a thin `brain` subcommand module that forwards to sched with a one-time stderr warning. Update hex-cli/src/main.rs and hex-cli/src/commands/mod.rs.

gate.command: cargo check --workspace && cargo build -p hex-cli && target/debug/hex sched --help >/dev/null && target/debug/hex brain --help 2>&1 | grep -i 'deprecated'

phases.name: CLI rename with alias

tasks.description: git mv hex-cli/src/commands/brain.rs hex-cli/src/commands/sched.rs. Rename pub fn brain() -> sched(), module path mod brain -> mod sched in hex-cli/src/commands/mod.rs. Update clap subcommand name from Brain to Sched; subcommand string 'brain' -> 'sched'. All internal call sites in hex-cli/src/commands/hook.rs (13 hits) update brain -> sched.
tasks.name: Rename brain.rs -> sched.rs

tasks.description: Add a minimal hex-cli/src/commands/brain_alias.rs exposing a hidden clap subcommand 'brain' (with #[command(hide = true)]) that mirrors the sched subcommand tree and forwards args. On first invocation per process, eprintln!("warning: `hex brain` is deprecated; use `hex sched` instead"). Wire into commands/mod.rs.
tasks.name: Hidden `brain` alias with deprecation warning

phases.description: Rename nexus REST routes /api/brain/* -> /api/sched/*. Keep brain routes dual-routed (same handlers) for one release; add X-Hex-Deprecated: true header on brain route responses.
phases.name: Nexus REST rename with dual routing

tasks.description: In hex-nexus/src/routes/mod.rs (or wherever the brain route group is registered), add new /api/sched/* routes mounting the same handlers. Keep /api/brain/* routes but wrap their responses in a layer that sets `X-Hex-Deprecated: use /api/sched` header and logs a warn! on every hit. Update any tests that hit /api/brain/* to also cover /api/sched/*.
tasks.name: Dual-route brain + sched

phases.description: Update statusline helpers, embedded hook YAMLs, CLAUDE.md rules 1/2/5, README. Rebuild hex-nexus to bake new statusline assets.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-nexus --release && node hex-cli/assets/helpers/hex-statusline.cjs 2>&1 | grep -v brain || true

phases.name: Statusline + assets + docs

tasks.description: In hex-cli/assets/helpers/hex-statusline.cjs and scripts/hex-statusline.cjs: swap statusline segment label 'brain' -> 'sched'. Update the API endpoint called from statusline to /api/sched/status (with fallback to /api/brain/status for older nexus versions during transition).
tasks.name: Statusline rename

tasks.description: Update hex-cli/assets/hooks/hex/*.yml. Any hook invoking `hex brain enqueue` or similar -> `hex sched enqueue`. Verify `hex doctor` still passes embedded-assets-generic after changes.
tasks.name: Embedded hook YAMLs

tasks.description: Update CLAUDE.md (autonomous operation rules 1, 2, 5) and README.md to use `hex sched` in all command examples. Do NOT rewrite docs/adrs/ADR-* or docs/workplans/wp-brain-*.json yet — that's P5.
tasks.name: Live docs rename

phases.description: Runtime state migration + live workplan rename. On daemon startup, if ~/.hex/brain-daemon.pid exists and ~/.hex/sched.pid does not, rename it. Also rename live workplans wp-brain-*.json -> wp-sched-*.json and update internal refs. Historical ADRs stay untouched.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-cli -p hex-nexus && target/debug/hex sched daemon-status

phases.name: State migration + live workplan rename

tasks.description: In the sched daemon startup (formerly brain-daemon), add one-time migration: if ~/.hex/brain-daemon.pid exists and ~/.hex/sched.pid does not, std::fs::rename the pidfile. Same for any other ~/.hex/brain-*.{json,db} state files discovered during P0 audit.
tasks.name: Pidfile/state rename on startup

tasks.description: git mv docs/workplans/wp-brain-*.json -> docs/workplans/wp-sched-*.json. Inside each, update the `id` field and any internal `brain` refs in descriptions. Do NOT touch docs/workplans/approved-*-brain-*.json nor docs/adrs/ADR-*brain*.md.
tasks.name: Rename live workplans

phases.description: Build release binaries, commit, verify. Rebuild release binaries per autonomy rule 2, commit the full rename as one atomic change, re-run hex doctor --verbose to confirm green.

gate.command: cargo build -p hex-cli -p hex-nexus --release && target/release/hex doctor

phases.name: Release build + commit

tasks.description: cargo build -p hex-cli -p hex-nexus --release. Then git add all renamed paths + content changes and commit with message 'refactor(cli): rename brain subsystem to sched (ADR-2604150000)'. Include ADR-2604150000 ref in commit body. Do NOT --amend; create a new commit.
tasks.name: Rebuild + commit

tasks.description: Run `hex doctor --verbose` and `hex sched daemon-status`. Verify statusline renders 'sched' not 'brain'. Verify `hex brain --help` still works and prints the deprecation warning to stderr. If all green, update ADR-2604150000 status from Proposed to Accepted.
tasks.name: Smoke + ADR status flip
